english: Where is the ticket office?
pinyin: Qǐngwèn shòupiàochù zài nǎlǐ?
usageNote: Ask for the location of the ticket counter.

english: I would like to buy one ticket to Beijing.
chinese: 我想买一张去北京的票。
pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng mǎi yī zhāng qù Běijīng de piào.
usageNote: State your purchase request clearly.
audioText: 我想买一张去北京的票。

english: What time does the next train depart?
pinyin: Xià yī bān huǒchē jǐ diǎn fāchē?
usageNote: Ask about the departure time of the next train.

english: Is this the platform for the train to Shanghai?
chinese: 这里是去上海的列车站台吗？
pinyin: Zhèlǐ shì qù Shànghǎi de lièchē zhàntái ma?
usageNote: Confirm you are at the correct platform.
audioText: 这里是去上海的列车站台吗？

english: Which platform does my train leave from?
chinese: 我的火车在哪个站台发车？
pinyin: Wǒ de huǒchē zài nǎgè zhàntái fāchē?
usageNote: Ask for your train's platform number.
audioText: 我的火车在哪个站台发车？

english: How long is the train ride?
pinyin: Huǒchē yào zuò duōjiǔ?
usageNote: Ask about the travel duration.

english: Do I need to transfer?
pinyin: Wǒ xūyào huànchéng ma?
usageNote: Ask if you need to change trains.

english: Where is my seat?
pinyin: Wǒ de zuòwèi zài nǎlǐ?
usageNote: Find your assigned seat.

english: Excuse me, is this seat taken?
chinese: 打扰一下，这个座位有人吗？
pinyin: Dǎrǎo yīxià, zhège zuòwèi yǒu rén ma?
usageNote: Politely check if a seat is available.
audioText: 打扰一下，这个座位有人吗？

english: Can I change to a window seat?
chinese: 我可以换到靠窗的座位吗？
pinyin: Wǒ kěyǐ huàn dào kào chuāng de zuòwèi ma?
usageNote: Request a seat change if possible.
audioText: 我可以换到靠窗的座位吗？

english: Is there a dining car on this train?
pinyin: Zhè lièchē yǒu cānchē ma?
usageNote: Inquire about food service on board.

english: When does the train arrive in Guangzhou?
chinese: 火车什么时候到达广州？
pinyin: Huǒchē shénme shíhòu dàodá Guǎngzhōu?
usageNote: Ask about the arrival time at your destination.
audioText: 火车什么时候到达广州？

english: Where is the restroom?
pinyin: Xǐshǒujiān zài nǎlǐ?
usageNote: Find the toilet on the train or in the station.

english: Is there Wi-Fi on the train?
pinyin: Huǒchē shàng yǒu Wi-Fi ma?
usageNote: Ask about internet availability.

english: Can I charge my phone here?
chinese: 这里可以给手机充电吗？
pinyin: Zhèlǐ kěyǐ gěi shǒujī chōngdiàn ma?
usageNote: Look for a power outlet.
audioText: 这里可以给手机充电吗？

english: This is my ticket.
pinyin: Zhè shì wǒ de chēpiào.
usageNote: Present your ticket for inspection.

english: My train has been delayed. What should I do?
chinese: 我的火车晚点了，我该怎么办？
pinyin: Wǒ de huǒchē wǎndiǎn le, wǒ gāi zěnme bàn?
usageNote: Ask for advice if your train is delayed.
audioText: 我的火车晚点了，我该怎么办？

english: I missed my train. Can I change my ticket?
chinese: 我错过火车了，可以改签吗？
pinyin: Wǒ cuòguò huǒchē le, kěyǐ gǎiqiān ma?
usageNote: Ask about changing your ticket after missing the train.
audioText: 我错过火车了，可以改签吗？

english: Can I get a refund for this ticket?
pinyin: Zhè zhāng piào kěyǐ tuìpiào ma?
usageNote: Inquire about the refund policy.

english: Help! My luggage is stuck.
chinese: 帮帮忙！我的行李卡住了。
pinyin: Bāng bang máng! Wǒ de xíngli kǎ zhù le.
usageNote: Call for help with stuck luggage.
audioText: 帮帮忙！我的行李卡住了。

english: Where can I store my luggage?
pinyin: Xíngli kěyǐ fàng zài nǎlǐ?
usageNote: Ask about luggage storage options.

english: I need to get off at the next stop.
pinyin: Wǒ xūyào zài xià yī zhàn xià chē.
usageNote: Inform the conductor of your imminent departure.

english: Is this the last stop?
pinyin: Zhè shì zhōngdiǎn zhàn ma?
usageNote: Confirm if you've reached the final destination.

english: Can I get a receipt for my ticket?
chinese: 可以给我一张车票的发票吗？
pinyin: Kěyǐ gěi wǒ yī zhāng chēpiào de fāpiào ma?
usageNote: Request a receipt for reimbursement.
audioText: 可以给我一张车票的发票吗？

english: Where is the lost and found office?
pinyin: Shīwù zhāolǐng chù zài nǎlǐ?
usageNote: Report or retrieve a lost item.

english: What is the train number?
pinyin: Zhè tàng chē de chēcì shì duōshǎo?
usageNote: Ask for the specific train number for reference.

english: How do I get to the subway from the train station?
chinese: 从火车站怎么换乘地铁？
pinyin: Cóng huǒchē zhàn zěnme huànchéng dìtiě?
usageNote: Ask for directions to connect to the metro.
audioText: 从火车站怎么换乘地铁？

english: Please don't smoke here.
pinyin: Qǐng bùyào zài zhèlǐ xīyān.
usageNote: Politely remind someone of the no-smoking rule.

english: I feel sick. Is there a doctor on the train?
chinese: 我感觉不舒服，车上有医生吗？
pinyin: Wǒ gǎnjué bù shūfu, chē shàng yǒu yīshēng ma?
usageNote: Seek medical help on the train if feeling unwell.
audioText: 我感觉不舒服，车上有医生吗？

english: Thank you for your help.
pinyin: Xièxie nín de bāngzhù.
usageNote: Express gratitude to staff or other passengers.

english: Does this train have a dining car?
Chinese: 这趟列车有餐车吗？
pinyin: zhè tàng lièchē yǒu cānchē ma?
usageNote: Useful on long-distance trains when you want to know about onboard dining options.

english: Can I get a window seat?
Chinese: 我可以坐靠窗的位置吗？
pinyin: wǒ kěyǐ zuò kào chuāng de wèizhì ma?
usageNote: Ask this when purchasing tickets or when boarding to request a window seat.
audioText: 我可以坐靠窗的位置吗？

english: How long is this train delayed?
Chinese: 列车晚点多长时间？
pinyin: lièchē wǎndiǎn duō cháng shíjiān?
usageNote: Use the 交通信息 board or ask staff when departure screens show delays.

english: Which car is the quiet car?
Chinese: 哪节车厢是静音车厢？
pinyin: nǎ jié chēxiāng shì jìngyīn chēxiāng?
usageNote: Some high-speed trains offer quiet cars for passengers who prefer silence.

english: Can you help me put my luggage up?
Chinese: 您能帮我把行李放上去吗？
pinyin: nín néng bāng wǒ bǎ xínglǐ fàng shàngqù ma?
usageNote: Polite request to staff or fellow passengers for heavy overhead luggage.
audioText: 您能帮我把行李放上去吗？

english: Does this train have Wi-Fi?
Chinese: 这趟车有无线网络吗？
pinyin: zhè tàng chē yǒu wúxiàn wǎngluò ma?
usageNote: Most Chinese high-speed trains now offer free Wi-Fi; ask staff for the network name.

english: Can I change to an earlier train?
Chinese: 我可以改签到更早的车次吗？
pinyin: wǒ kěyǐ gǎiqiān dào gèng zǎo de chēcì ma?
usageNote: 改签 (gǎiqiān) means changing your ticket. Fees may apply depending on ticket type.
audioText: 我可以改签到更早的车次吗？

english: What is the final stop of this train?
Chinese: 这趟车的终点站是哪里？
pinyin: zhè tàng chē de zhōngdiǎn zhàn shì nǎlǐ?
usageNote: Useful to confirm you are on the correct train, especially at busy stations.
audioText: 这趟车的终点站是哪里？

english: Can you remind me before my stop?
Chinese: 到站前您能提醒我一下吗？
pinyin: dào zhàn qián nín néng tíxǐng wǒ yīxià ma?
usageNote: Ask a fellow passenger or conductor on overnight trains or if you tend to fall asleep.
audioText: 到站前您能提醒我一下吗？

english: Is there a power outlet at my seat?
Chinese: 我的座位有充电插座吗？
pinyin: wǒ de zuòwèi yǒu chōngdiàn chāzuò ma?
usageNote: Most high-speed train seats have outlets; ask the conductor if you can't find yours.
audioText: 我的座位有充电插座吗？

english: Excuse me, is this seat taken?
Chinese: 请问，这个座位有人吗？
pinyin: qǐngwèn, zhège zuòwèi yǒu rén ma?
usageNote: Polite way to check before sitting, especially in non-reserved seating areas.

english: How long does the train stop here?
Chinese: 列车在这里停多久？
pinyin: lièchē zài zhèlǐ tíng duōjiǔ?
usageNote: Useful at intermediate stops if you want to step out briefly for fresh air.

english: Can I get wheelchair assistance on the platform?
Chinese: 站台上可以提供轮椅服务吗？
pinyin: zhàntái shàng kěyǐ tígōng lúnyī fúwù ma?
usageNote: Most major stations offer free wheelchair and boarding assistance for disabled passengers.
audioText: 站台上可以提供轮椅服务吗？

english: What is the luggage size limit?
Chinese: 行李尺寸限制是多少？
pinyin: xínglǐ chǐcùn xiànzhì shì duōshǎo?
usageNote: China's railway has specific size limits for carry-on luggage; oversized items need special handling.

english: Which platform does my train depart from?
Chinese: 我的车在几号站台出发？
pinyin: wǒ de chē zài jǐ hào zhàntái chūfā?
usageNote: Check the large departure boards or ask staff; platform numbers may change last minute.
audioText: 我的车在几号站台出发？

english: Can I order food to my seat?
Chinese: 可以送餐到座位吗？
pinyin: kěyǐ sòng cān dào zuòwèi ma?
usageNote: High-speed trains often have a WeChat mini-program or onboard cart for seat delivery.

english: Do I need to scan my ticket at the gate?
Chinese: 进站需要刷身份证吗？
pinyin: jìn zhàn xūyào shuā shēnfèn zhèng ma?
usageNote: Most stations now use ID card scanning instead of paper tickets; have your passport ready.

english: What is the difference between first class and second class?
Chinese: 一等座和二等座有什么区别？
pinyin: yīděng zuò hé èrděng zuò yǒu shénme qūbié?
usageNote: First class offers wider seats and more legroom; business class is the most premium option.
audioText: 一等座和二等座有什么区别？

english: Can I extend my ticket to a further stop?
Chinese: 我的票可以延长到更远的站吗？
pinyin: wǒ de piào kěyǐ yáncháng dào gèng yuǎn de zhàn ma?
usageNote: You can usually extend your ticket onboard by paying the fare difference to the conductor.
audioText: 我的票可以延长到更远的站吗？

english: How do I transfer to the subway from here?
Chinese: 从这里怎么换乘地铁？
pinyin: cóng zhèlǐ zěnme huànchéng dìtiě?
usageNote: Many large train stations are connected directly to metro; follow 地铁 signs or ask staff.
